data.name: SubtaskConcurrencyDescription
data.value: Inner file concurrency within a directory.

data.name: TaskFailurePolicyDescription
data.value: Task failure policy: Continue, StopCurrentTask, StopAll.

data.name: DryRunDescription
data.value: Print the resolved plan without executing.

data.name: FileLogLevelDescription
data.value: File log level (None disables file logging).

data.name: UiFailMaxDescription
data.value: Maximum failed entries retained per task.

data.name: UiDoneMaxDescription
data.value: Maximum recent completed files retained per folder task.

data.name: UiTaskMaxDescription
data.value: Maximum in-memory tasks retained by TUI.

data.name: UiPageSizeDescription
data.value: Default page size when terminal height is unavailable.

data.name: UiFailShowDescription
data.value: Visible failed entries count in detail view.

data.name: UiDoneShowDescription
data.value: Visible recent completed files count in detail view.

data.name: LangDescription
data.value: UI language in BCP 47 tags. Supported: en-US, zh-CN, zh-TW, ja-JP, ko-KR.
